style: Chinese ink wash painting meets modern anime, traditional Chinese mythology aesthetic, mystical and dynamic atmosphere, ink texture with subtle gold accents

scenes.first_frame_prompt: A majestic golden Chinese dragon soaring through dramatic ink wash clouds and mountain peaks, epic opening, Chinese ink wash painting meets modern anime, mystical atmosphere, vertical 9:16
scenes.motion_prompt: The golden dragon weaves through swirling ink clouds, mist parts and reforms, mountain peaks recede into the distance
scenes.narration: 龙生九子，各怀绝技，化身世间万物。

scenes.first_frame_prompt: Same Qiuniu mythological beast as reference, sitting gracefully on top of an ancient guqin zither, ink mist swirling, soft golden light catching the dragon head, Chinese ink wash painting meets modern anime, gentle musical atmosphere, vertical 9:16
scenes.motion_prompt: Qiuniu gently listens, head tilts slightly, a faint musical note glow appears, the guqin strings vibrate softly
scenes.narration: 长子·囚牛，性好音律，常立于琴头。

scenes.first_frame_prompt: Same Yazi mythological beast as reference, glaring ferociously while gripping a traditional Chinese sword hilt, ink splashes, intense red accent light, Chinese ink wash painting meets modern anime, fierce aggressive atmosphere, vertical 9:16
scenes.motion_prompt: Yazi snarls and glares, claws tighten on the sword hilt, ink splatters dynamically around the beast
scenes.narration: 次子·睚眦，嗜杀好斗，怒目镇刀剑。

scenes.first_frame_prompt: Same Chaofeng mythological beast as reference, perched majestically on a traditional Chinese palace roof corner, gazing into the distance, ink clouds below, Chinese ink wash painting meets modern anime, elegant watchful atmosphere, vertical 9:16
scenes.motion_prompt: Chaofeng perches on the roof corner, feathers ruffle in the wind, gaze sweeps across the landscape below
scenes.narration: 三子·嘲风，喜登高望远，端坐殿角。

scenes.first_frame_prompt: Same Pulao mythological beast as reference, mouth wide open roaring atop a massive bronze temple bell, sound waves visualized in ink ripples, Chinese ink wash painting meets modern anime, dynamic roaring atmosphere, vertical 9:16
scenes.motion_prompt: Pulao roars loudly, the bronze bell rings, ink ripples emanate from the beast's mouth like sound waves
scenes.narration: 四子·蒲牢，性好鸣叫，栖于洪钟。

scenes.first_frame_prompt: Same Suanni mythological beast as reference, sitting calmly atop an ornate Chinese bronze incense burner, wisps of incense smoke rising around, peaceful expression, Chinese ink wash painting meets modern anime, zen peaceful atmosphere, vertical 9:16
scenes.motion_prompt: Suanni sits serenely, incense smoke curls around, the lion-like beast breathes softly with closed eyes
scenes.narration: 五子·狻猊，喜静好坐，伴于香炉。

scenes.first_frame_prompt: Same Baxia mythological beast as reference, carrying a massive ancient stone stele on its back, low angle showing the beast's strength, Chinese ink wash painting meets modern anime, monumental powerful atmosphere, vertical 9:16
scenes.motion_prompt: Baxia stands stoically under the heavy stele, the beast's legs slightly shift with the weight, dust particles drift around
scenes.narration: 六子·霸下，力大无穷，背负千斤石碑。

scenes.first_frame_prompt: Same Bian mythological beast as reference, standing guard at a traditional Chinese courthouse gate, fierce yet righteous expression, ink splashes, red accent light, Chinese ink wash painting meets modern anime, authoritative just atmosphere, vertical 9:16
scenes.motion_prompt: Bian stands guard with dignified posture, eyes scan the surroundings, ink dust swirls around the gate
scenes.narration: 七子·狴犴，明察秋毫，镇守公堂律门。

scenes.first_frame_prompt: Same Fuxi mythological beast as reference, gracefully coiled beside an ancient stone stele inscribed with calligraphy, scholarly posture, soft warm light, Chinese ink wash painting meets modern anime, cultured poetic atmosphere, vertical 9:16
scenes.motion_prompt: Fuxi gracefully coils around the stele, head lifts slightly as if reading the calligraphy, ink particles drift like falling petals
scenes.narration: 八子·负屃，雅好文采，盘绕碑文。

scenes.first_frame_prompt: Same Chiwen mythological beast as reference, mouth open spraying water upward, perched on a traditional Chinese palace roof ridge, dynamic blue water streams, Chinese ink wash painting meets modern anime, dynamic protective atmosphere, vertical 9:16
scenes.motion_prompt: Chiwen's mouth opens wide, water streams shoot upward, the dragon-fish hybrid perches dynamically on the roof ridge
scenes.narration: 九子·螭吻，能喷浪降雨，立于屋脊。

scenes.first_frame_prompt: A panoramic view of all nine dragon sons arranged around a magnificent Chinese palace silhouette, ink clouds and golden light, Chinese ink wash painting meets modern anime, epic cultural atmosphere, vertical 9:16
scenes.motion_prompt: Camera slowly pulls back to reveal the panoramic view, all nine sons' silhouettes glow with golden light, ink clouds swirl around the palace
scenes.narration: 九子各安其位，千年守护中华文脉。
